{{Quote|Fleet admirals have it made. They only have to worry about the success of their subordinates, their Moff, and guys whose name begins with Lord.|Captain Seledrood|<ref name="ISB" />}}
'''Seledrood''' was a [[Captain/Legends|captain]] in the [[Imperial Navy/Legends|Imperial Navy]] who commented about [[Fleet Admiral/Legends|Fleet Admirals]]. Seledrood [[Death/Legends|died]] some time after making the observation.
